steps.title: extractConstraints
steps.details: Extract travel constraints from user prompt
steps.output: Duration: 3 days, Budget: STANDARD, Style: LEISURE

Top of Brandenburg Gate, Berlin, Germany. # Berlin. It lies at the heart of the North German Plain in the wide glacial valley of the Spree River, which runs through the center of the city. Though partitioned into East and West Berlin after World War II, the reunification of East and West Germany led to Berlinâs reinstatement as the all-German capital in 1990. The city lies at the heart of the North German Plain, athwart an east-west commercial and geographic axis that helped make it the capital of the kingdom of Prussia and then, from 1871, of a unified Germany. The city itself echoed the national partitionâEast Berlin being the capital of East Germany and West Berlin a *Land* (state) of the Federal Republic of Germany (FRG, or West Germany).
